query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.departamentoId, u.leaderId, udr.departmentId, udr.assignmentType FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_department_roles udr ON u.id = udr.userId WHERE u.id = 180085 LIMIT 10;
